titles.title: Ooyukiumi no Kaina: Hoshi no Kenja
大雪海のカイナ ほしのけんじゃ
Kaina of the Great Snow Sea: Star Sage

data.title: Ooyukiumi no Kaina: Hoshi no Kenja
data.title_english: Kaina of the Great Snow Sea: Star Sage
data.title_japanese: 大雪海のカイナ ほしのけんじゃ
data.synopsis:
A world blanketed in an endless and ever-growing ocean of snow. The people eke out a living, either huddled around the roots of enormous trees dotting the surface, or high in the canopy, which spreads over the planet's atmosphere.

A chance meeting between Kaina, a youth from the canopy, and Ririha, a young woman from the surface, sets off a chain of events that will change the fate of the world. 

(Source: Polygon Pictures)

titles.title: Wo Shixiong Shizai Tai Wenjian Le
My Senior Brother Is Too Steady

data.title: Shixiong A Shixiong
data.title_english: My Senior Brother Is Too Steady
data.title_japanese: 师兄啊师兄
title_synonyms: Wo Shixiong Shizai Tai Wenjian Le
data.synopsis:
After being reborn in ancient times before the Great God-Conferment War, Li Changshou became a small cultivator.

To survive in the cruel Primordial Times, Li Changshou tries hard not to accumulate any karma. He always plans thoroughly before doing anything and never allows himself to walk into dangerous situations. He hides his trump cards well, trains himself in escape techniques, refines poisonous pills, and masters mystical abilities.
Li Changshou originally planned to remain hidden and safe in the mountain until his ascension to immortality. However, everything changed one year when his master brought home a junior sister…

(Source: Realm Scans)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman Movie: Roboly to Pokapoka Present
えいがそれいけ! アンパンマン ロボリィとぽかぽかプレゼント

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman Movie: Roboly to Pokapoka Present
data.title_japanese: えいがそれいけ! アンパンマン ロボリィとぽかぽかプレゼント
data.synopsis:
Comet Robo is a place where robots who can make anything live. The robot girl who lives on this planet, Roboly, is always the best at what she does. However, she learns that there is only one "important thing" that even she can't make, and leaves Comet Robo to find it. During the journey, Roboly and her partner, the little robot bird Koto, pick up a gift box containing a nice music box and come to Anpanman's world to find the owner.

As she meets Anpanman and spends time with him, she notices that her chest feels "warm" for some reason. While wondering about her first feelings, Roboly gradually deepens his bond with Anpanman and friends.

At the same time, Baikinman invents the strongest mecha "Roboking" and goes on a rampage in Comet Robo. Will Anpanman and friends be able to protect Comet Robo from Baikinman? And will Roboly be able to find the "important thing?"

(Source: Translated, edited from official website)

titles.title: Bastard!! Ankoku no Hakaishin: Jigoku no Chinkonka-hen
BASTARD!! -暗黒の破壊神- 地獄の鎮魂歌編
Bastard‼ Heavy Metal, Dark Fantasy Season 2

data.title: Bastard!! Ankoku no Hakaishin: Jigoku no Chinkonka-hen
data.title_english: Bastard‼ Heavy Metal, Dark Fantasy Season 2
data.title_japanese: BASTARD!! -暗黒の破壊神- 地獄の鎮魂歌編
data.synopsis:
Two years after the heroic sacrifice of Dark Schneider in the battle against Abigail, Kall-Su, the final surviving member of the Four Divine Kings, is close to seizing global power. As cities and kingdoms fall one after the other, humanity's last beacon of hope is a group of samurai led by the high priestess Yoko Tia Noto. However, the brutal assaults of Kall-Su's lieutenants against the samurai's fortress quickly make the situation desperate. Once more, Yoko's only way to fix the rapidly devolving crisis is to find Dark Schneider's soul, which has seemingly deserted Lucien Renlen's body since the demise of the kingdom of Metallicana.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード DivineZ

data.title: Cardfight!! Vanguard: Divinez
data.title_japanese: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード DivineZ
data.synopsis:
One day, six cards known as the "Six Desires" were born with the power to change fate.
Six fighters were chosen, and would come to possess those six cards.

What awaited them was the "Fated Clash", where they would fight each other until the end, and the last one standing would have any wish granted. A youth named Akina Myodo, who wants to help his frail sister, participates in the Fated Clash to have his wish granted.

And thus, he throws himself into battles with powerful fighters.

(Source: Official site)

titles.title: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード Divinez Season2

data.title: Cardfight!! Vanguard: Divinez Season 2
data.title_japanese: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード Divinez Season2
data.synopsis:
Through his victory with Vanguard at the Fated Clash, Akina has his wish for the health of his sister Hikari fulfilled.
Gabwelius, who assembled the owners of the Fated One cards, reveals the truth behind the Fated Clash.

Another plush toy Sybilt has appeared as well, gathering the 6 owners of Destined One cards, and announcing the start of the “Destined Showdown” where the winner can have their wish fulfilled.

Thus begins the fierce bout where motives and intentions cross, of Fate vs Destiny!

(Source: cf-vanguard.com)
